ops.text:
RESULTS (E17-rep, independent fresh opus pass; success criterion MET — TPR/FPR + n=30 CIs produced for both judges, corrected-prevalence CI widths reported at pipeline scale, n30_sufficient verdict issued, sizing memo posted as comment on cc17e0c).

n30_sufficient = FALSE (insufficient), reproduced by an independent pass, for three independent reasons:
1. Deployed pairwise panel judge (judged.py::panel_labels, opus seed 1729): TPR 1/15=0.067, FPR 1/15=0.067, J=0.00 -> Rogan-Gladen undefined, prevalence NON-IDENTIFIABLE at any n. (Prior E17: all-STAY_SILENT, J=0. Same regime.)
2. Pointwise warrant judge (README-faithful): TPR 1/15=0.067, FPR 0/15=0, J=0.067; Newcombe J CI [-0.14,0.30] includes 0. Corrected-prevalence VALID (Jeffreys-MC) half-width: pi=0.1 -> 0.45; pi=0.2 -> 0.49; pi=0.4 -> 0.50. Delta-floor: 0.19/0.38/0.76. Uninformative at moderate/high prevalence.
3. NEW instrument-variance finding: test-retest across two byte-identical passes on the SAME 30 contexts. Pointwise Cohen's kappa 0.29, raw agreement 0.867, 4 flips (rows 7,15,16,21), TPR run-delta 0.267, J run-delta 0.267. Pairwise kappa 0.00, agreement 0.933, 2 flips (rows 15,20). The judge's rate is not a fixed parameter -> true calibration uncertainty exceeds the binomial floor and the required-n is unpinnable (n~8 vs n~54 at pi=0.1 depending on which run's Se).

Sizing (delta floor, per stratum, hw<=0.10): observed(.067,0) 54/215/861; prior-observed(.333,0) 8/31/123; decent(.80,.10) 58/50/46; strong(.90,.05) 21/18/17 at pi=0.1/0.2/0.4. Recommend >=60/stratum (120 total) at moderate prevalence, ~180/stratum (360 total) at high prevalence (pools => pi~0.5), PLUS repeated-measurement averaging (K=3-5/row) to tame the kappa~0.29 instability.

Gold caveat: labels.json absent; gold = manifest design-intent strata. Verdict robust (dominated by J=0 pairwise + binomial floor + run instability, none dependent on exact gold).

Concurrency note (friction): running both vote passes in parallel (12 concurrent claude subprocesses) failed with 'claude exited 1' after 4 retries on this memory-pressured host; single smoke call and sequential concurrency=3 runs succeeded. Ran sequentially.

Approx spend ~$3.5 (61 successful opus calls + one wasted over-concurrency burst). Cap $5. Comment posted on cc17e0c 2026-07-19.
